languages.text: {n}Ферренц быстро подходит к вам и вытаскивает из-под полы сверток, по форме напоминающий отданный вами аугмент.{/n} "Эффективность машины восстановлена. Запись о нахождении техноереси внутри системы Сектор Бионика удалена".

traits.locale_text: {n}Франциск быстро подходит к вам и вытаскивает из-под полы сверток, по форме напоминающий отданный вами аугмент.{/n} "Лечение произведено. Запись о нахождении ксеноереси внутри системы Сектум Бионика... Удалена".

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."
languages.original_text: {n}Ферренц быстро подходит к вам и вытаскивает из-под полы сверток, по форме напоминающий отданный вами аугмент.{/n} "Эффективность машины восстановлена. Запись о нахождении техноереси внутри системы Сектор Бионика удалена".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

{n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

{n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "Restoration has been carried out. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

{n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

{n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

languages.text: フェレンツが急いで近づいてきた。デッキの下から、彼が受け取った増幅器と同じ大きさで形をした包みを取り出した。 「修復完了。セクター・ビオニカシステム内のテクノヘレシーの記録は削除された」
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "Restoration has been carried out. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: フェレンツが急いで近づいてきた。デッキの下から、彼が受け取った増幅器と同じ大きさで形をした包みを取り出した。 「修復完了。セクター・ビオニカシステム内のテクノヘレシーの記録は削除されました。」

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz hızla sana yaklaşıyor ve güvertenin altından, ona verdiğin ogmentle aynı boyutta ve şekilde bir paket çıkarıyor.{/n} "Makinenin verimliliği yeniden sağlandı. Sektör Biyonika sistemindeki tekno kâfirlik kaydı silindi."
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz hızla sana yaklaşıyor ve güvertenin altından, ona verdiğin ogmentle aynı boyutta ve şekilde bir paket çıkarıyor.{/n} "Makinenin verimliliği yeniden sağlandı. Sektör Biyonika sistemindeki tekno kâfirlik kaydı silindi."

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz se acerca rápidamente a ti y, de debajo del escritorio, saca un paquete con el mismo tamaño y forma que el aumento que le diste.{/n} «La eficacia de esta máquina ha sido restaurada. Se ha eliminado el registro de la tecnoherejía del sistema del Sector Bionica».
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz se acerca rápidamente a ti y, de debajo del escritorio, saca un paquete con el mismo tamaño y forma que el aumento que le diste.{/n} «La eficacia de esta máquina ha sido restaurada. Se ha eliminado el registro de la tecnoherejía del sistema del Sector Bionica».

languages.text: {n}费伦茨快步上前，从甲板下掏出一个包裹，大小和形状都与你给他的植入物相同。{/n}“该机械效率已恢复。仿生区系统内的技术异端记录已被删除。”
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: {n}费伦茨快步上前，从甲板下掏出一个包裹，大小和形状都与你给他的植入物相同。{/n}“该机械效率已恢复。仿生区系统内的技术异端记录已被删除。”

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz s'approche d'un pas rapide, puis vous tend un paquet de la même taille et de la même forme que l'augmentation que vous lui avez confiée.{/n} « L'efficacité de cette machine a été rétablie. Les traces de technohérésie ont été supprimées des systèmes du secteur Bionica. »
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz s'approche d'un pas rapide, puis vous tend un paquet de la même taille et de la même forme que l'augmentation que vous lui avez confiée.{/n} « L'efficacité de cette machine a été rétablie. Les traces de technohérésie ont été supprimées des systèmes du secteur Bionica. »

languages.text: {n}Ferrenz tritt rasch an dich heran und zieht unter dem Deck ein Paket hervor, das die gleiche Größe und Form aufweist wie die Augmentation, die du ihm gegeben hast.{/n} "Die Effizienz dieser Maschine wurde wiederhergestellt. Die Aufzeichnung der Tech-Ketzerei im System Sektor Bionica wurde gelöscht."
languages.original_text: {n}Ferrenz approaches you quickly and, from under the deck, pulls out a package the same size and shape as the augment you gave him.{/n} "The efficiency of this machine has been restored. The record of tech-heresy within the Sector Bionica system has been deleted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ferrenz tritt rasch an dich heran und zieht unter dem Deck ein Paket hervor, das die gleiche Größe und Form aufweist wie die Augmentation, die du ihm gegeben hast.{/n} "Die Effizienz dieser Maschine wurde wiederhergestellt. Die Aufzeichnung der Tech-Ketzerei im System Sektor Bionica wurde gelöscht."
